meaning: v.担任临时保姆,照顾婴儿
examples: Today, I babysat my neighbour's spoilt bratty twins.
Last week I babysat my niece and I actually made this mistake.
When I was babysitting, the little girl I babysat asked me if I wanted some and right after I was done I went to the store and bought some.
Every Wednesday, for example, she babysat for the children of her granddaughter the nursing student.
To get by, she babysat and often had meals at the neighbors'.
